occurrence.level_1: Very low: Remote chance, rarely occurs

severity.level_1: Very low: Effect not detectable in the system
severity.level_2: Low: Perceived by the user causing few consequences
severity.level_3: Moderate: Failure at a considerable level, affects product performance. User is bothered
severity.level_4: High: User totally dissatisfied, product stops working
severity.level_5: Very high: Potential safety risk and serious non-compliance problems

detection.level_1: Very low: Certainly will be detected
detection.level_2: Low: High probability of being detected
detection.level_4: High: Probably will not be detected
detection.level_5: Very high: Certainly will not be detected
